ab: cku’ kaal ka’ 2022, makaal ku’ sebu maha’, senbenceng nku’ Yencumin ga’ balaiq patasi nanaq cu’ ralu’ na’ Itaal.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: paqucan mi Kyusi’ na’ Baay ka’ kiya cku’ tinqalangan ka’ mugumalaq ka’ minusa’ ’i’ masina’ cu’ patasi nanaq ku’ ralu’ na’ Itaal cku’ senbenceng cku’ sebu.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年Kyusi’ na’ Baay。
en: I interviewed Kyusi’ na’ Baay, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: makaal cu ki’ hiya’ cku’ a’hangiqan ka’ hani. ma’usa’ cu mitaal ’i’ hiya’.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: maskakaru’ cami ka’ hani ga’, kaalun cu niya’ ku’ ralu’ niya’ ka’ minuwah inu’. sipakababaq niya’ kuwing ku’ imuwag niya’, tinqalangan niya’.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: paqucan mi hiya’, micuwa’ su’ ka’ asiki yugun ku’ ralu’ su’. aqih ku’ capang ka’ pinatas cu’ cunga’ pisa’?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: kaalun cu niya’ maha’, aqih gi’ pinatiq nku’ Tu’iya’ ga’, ini baqi nababalaiq ’i’ papkital cu’ cuquliq ku’ ralu’ niya’, pakaal cu’ buwinah ku’ cuquliq na’ maha’, “Kyusiyenseng”. kahi payux ku’ sumsasiyaq ka’ kai’.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「古先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"Ku Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: kumaal ’i’ Kyusi’ na’ Baay maha’, “yani cubalay ku’ ralu’ ta’ ka’ pinatiq nku’ Yencumin. ralu’ mu ga’ yani ku’ ralu’ na’ Itaal niyam, qutux cu’ imuwaag niyam, senben niyam, wana’ ara’ruwa’ payux ku’ itaal ka’ musa’ ’i’ kumiyum cku’ ralu’ naha’ nanaq.”
ch: Kyusi’ na’ Baay說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: Kyusi’ na’ Baay said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
